title: ChillZone2
description:
The next Mod-Project for the ChillZone-Community.
With focus on Create!
body:
ChillZone Create & Space Exploration Modpack

A community modpack merging Create-based machinery with space travel and Stargates. Build intricate factories, launch rockets to new planets, and instantly teleport between bases via Stargate.

Key Features:

- Create & Addons: Gears, conveyors, automation
- Ad Astra & Rocketed: Rocket construction, multiple explorable planets
- JSG Stargates: Instant long-distance travel
- Tech Mods: Mekanism, Immersive Engineering, Applied Energistics 2
- QoL Enhancements: JEI, BetterF3, Quark, Serene Seasons
_Officially required for the private ChillZone server._
